Video.summary: A New Jersey woman sues her ex-boyfriend for property exchange of her beloved cat.
Video.title: Monsanto vs. Eskander

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: First, a man sues estranged friend for an unpaid loan. Then, couple is suing for an unfinished remodeling job.
Video.title: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Image.alt: Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room
Out of the Kitchen, into the Court Room

Video.summary: A woman sues for $5,000 because, she says, a dog charged her and caused her to fall and break her wrist; a woman wants a tattoo artist to return her money for services not rendered.
Video.title: It's All in the Wrist

Video.summary: First, a real life family feud unfolds. Then, a man sues for breach of contract.
Video.title: All in the Family

Video.summary: First, a sister sues her brother for $5000. Then, a woman claims a man stole her puppy.
Video.title: Oh, Brother

Video.summary: Stacy claims her mom Sherry promised to support her in college. Sherry says she's jobless and can't afford her allowance.
Video.title: The Long Con

Video.summary: A woman says her ex-fiance split without paying his share of the bills; an attempt to help a homeless single mom went awry when, the plaintiff claims, the defendant nearly burned down her kitchen.
Video.title: Charred Intentions

Video.summary: First, a woman wants reimbursement for temporary loan. Then, plaintiff claims unpaid rent and damages.
Video.title: Going Under

Video.summary: The owner of a dog who was viciously attacked by a pit bull and eventually died is now left with veterinary bills and emotionally distraught; a woman accuses her ex-boyfriend of stealing her debit card while she was incarcerated.
Video.title: All Dogs Go to Court

Video.summary: An unfinished construction job results in a heap of garbage, but the defendant says he did exactly what he was paid to do; a woman sues her sister for car repairs.
Video.title: Nailed It… or Failed It?

Video.summary: An unpaid loan brings a woman and her grandson's ex-girlfriend to court; a woman regrets agreeing to take out a loan for her ex-boyfriend.
Video.title: Loanly Regrets

Video.summary: Angel Guzman sues Damaris Damian for $3,000, claiming she kidnapped his Shih Tzu, Maxie, after he spent $2,000 at the vet. Damaris says Angel gave her Maxie to protect him from his Pitbull.
Video.title: You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back

Image.alt: You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back
You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back
You Stole My Dog: Now Give It Back

Video.summary: A broken cellphone after a heated argument has a Texas couple standing in front of the judges.
Video.title: Oliver vs. Boyce

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: A woman says her former roommate moved out after three months because he wanted more from their relationship than she was willing to give, and she sues him for unpaid rent.
Video.title: Unrequited Rent

Video.summary: Russell King claims Rasheeda Brown owes him $3,000 for painting her house, despite doing an excellent job. Rasheeda argues he brought his son to work with heavy machinery, acted inappropriately, and left the job incomplete.
Video.title: Painting Disaster

Video.summary: Multiple evictions and growing collection fees have exes Diamond and Eric arguing in court over who's at fault.
Video.title: Walton vs. Watkins

Video.summary: Kenneth sues his wife, Monika, for $1,000 in property damage because she burned his clothes after he refused to clean up after himself.
Video.title: Burke vs. Burke

Video.summary: Perrion and Steven didn't last as a couple but hope to make it as business partners; it may be time for a drug test.
Video.title: Roberts vs. Powell

Video.summary: Suspicions of cheating and a claim for $695 have Jasmine and Gerrel seeking relationship advice.
Video.title: Doggett vs. Townsend

Video.summary: When Mike’s cheating past still makes Sally feel insecure, she brings him before the Cutlers for guidance.
Video.title: Herrera vs Gallardo

Video.summary: Pablo’s got jokes, but Joanna isn’t laughing. They bring their issues to the Cutlers for help saving their marriage.
Video.title: Aleman vs Aleman

Video.summary: Texas pair Joel and Erin go head to head in court to handle some unfinished business after their breakup.
Video.title: Whitaker vs. Estevez

Video.summary: A DNA test, a relationship on the edge and an ultimatum that could change everything put a young couple's future on the line.
Video.title: Wright vs. Flanagan

Video.summary: Dawn confronts her boyfriend, Josh, about ongoing entanglements with his ex and various other women.
Video.title: Jones vs. Shaffer

Video.summary: Jerkmeeka issues Rodriquez an ultimatum after his longtime female friend begins interfering in their marriage.
Video.title: Tuggle-Wright vs. Tuggle

Video.summary: Sable suspects girlfriend Mechelle of giving extra during her massage practice and petitions her to take a polygraph test.
Video.title: Myers vs. Crossland

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating and a claim for more than $8,000 have exes Isabella and Sarah squabbling in court.
Video.title: Gomez vs. Banks

Video.summary: A paternity test will determine the fate of Keith and Rochelle's relationship after questions arise from her ex's family.
Video.title: Jordan vs. Dawson

Video.summary: Keith wants his girlfriend, Jacey, to take a polygraph test because he suspects she cheated with an older customer at her job.
Video.title: Fitchpatrick vs. Gray

Video.summary: A father's doubt and a mother's plea collide in court over paternity, love and a baby's future.
Video.title: Willis vs. Hagans

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Theresa and Paul Cacciato are suing their former tenant, Theresa Kordulak, for $2,160, accusing her of damaging their furnace after leaving her pet grooming business. Kordulak denies the claim, stating the furnace never worked and countersues
Video.title: Fireworks Over a Furnace

Video.summary: Viktoriya claims her neighbor Mario's dog damaged her $730 coat by ripping its sleeve. She’s suing for the cost, calling him irresponsible. Mario counters, alleging Viktoriya taunted his dog and provoked the incident.
Video.title: Neighbors at War

Video.summary: Christopher Shaw sues tenant La'Shaunda Harris for $700, accusing her of being a professional rent scammer. La'Shaunda countersues for $657.65, claiming he’s a terrible landlord.
Video.title: Riot Over the Internet

Video.summary: Denise sues her ex, Darryl, claiming he tricked her into paying their son’s $200 DUI bail entirely, instead of splitting it. Darryl counters, saying she wired the money voluntarily and owes him $21,000 in back child support.
Video.title: You Are a Deadbeat Mom!

Video.summary: Plaintiff rented a room from the defendant; he's suing for the return of his security deposit.
Video.title: Room for Rent

Video.summary: Malik is here to peition the court for a paternity test after believing his girlfriend was cheating on him.
Video.title: Unplanned Parenthood

Video.summary: Prestonie sues his mother for assault and hotel bills and claims she admitted to hating him.
Video.title: Mommy Issues

Video.summary: Brian is being sued by his wife Doretha for an illegal eviction after she left when he brought another woman home.
Video.title: Three's a Crowd

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: Claudette is suing her neighbor for jumping her and falsely accusing her of pullling a gun on her daughter.
Video.title: Gunning for Her Neighbor

Video.summary: Trying to regain custody of her children, Shamika wants to prove her ex is the father of her youngest child.
Video.title: Plaintiff’s Paternity Petition

Video.summary: Ex-roommates call each other a deadbeat and a con artist; a former tenant wants to be compensated for repairs he made to a flooded, moldy basement, and his security deposit.
Video.title: Con-venient Deadbeat

Video.summary: First, a client demands refund from fitness trainer. Then, a woman seeks payment for bounced check.
Video.title: Bouncing and Trouncing

Video.summary: First, plaintiff claims she was struck by the defendant. Then, dance partners battle over unpaid expenses.
Video.title: To Each Their Due

Video.summary: First, man sues his ex-wife for gas bill. Then, plaintiffs are suing for unpaid wages and fuel costs.
Video.title: All Gas, No Breaks

Video.summary: A woman claims she was duped by a travel agent and is out $100; a defendant doesn't believe she should be held liable for water damage because the plaintiff has tenants in the property that has been damaged.
Video.title: Trips, Drips, and Legal Quips
